messages.content:
"During the internal review of Tofacitinib citrate (JP) API batches COAs, Enantiomer content test results (i.e, LOD & LOQ values) found  units in ‘ppm’ instead of  ‘%’ on COA for three batches 25524516, 25524517 and 25524952.

Verified the analytical data of enantiomeric test for subject three batches (25524516, 25524517 and 25524952) and  the obtained enantiomer content results found to have met the specification , the results are,
S. No.	       A.R. No.	       Batch No.	Result	 
   1	     ML8FPR23002455	25524516	  0.006	   
   2	     ML8FPR23002593	25524516	  0.006	
   3	     ML8FPR23002594	25524516	  0.004	

   4	      ML8FPR23002456	25524517	  0.005	   
   5	      ML8FPR23002595	25524517	  0.009	
   6	      ML8FPR23002596	25524517	  0.005	

   7 	      ML8FPR23002457	25524952	  0.012	   
   8         ML8FPR23002597	25524952	  0.006	
   9	      ML8FPR23002598	25524952	   0.01	

As per respective Tofacitinib citrate STP (STP/FPR/TOC/003/00) and Enantiomer content by HPLC test units as % and their LOD, LOQ values are 0.004% and 0.012% respectively.
The subject three batches (25524516, 25524517 and 25524952) enantiomer content results were less than 0.012%, as per the obtaining enantiomer content results to be reported as  BQL (LOQ:0.012 %) and BDL (LOD:0.004%), however the results appeared as BQL (LOQ:0.012ppm) instead of BQL (LOQ:0.012%) and  BDL (LOD:0.004ppm) instead of BDL (LOD:0.004%) in the COAs.
Verified the subject Tofacitinib citrate product LIMS test plan of respective STP (STP/FPR/TOC/003/00) in the LIMS master , subject test plan was initiated by H. Madhusudhana Rao (QCD, m251175) and approved by  QC & QA reviewer [B. Jagannadha Naidu (QCD, m251169) and S. Rama Krishna (QAD,m251160)] .
Verified the Enantiomer content by HPLC test in the LIMS master and the UOM for the Enantiomer content found to be in %.However, units of the LOD and LOQ were identified  as 0.004 ppm and 0.012 ppm instead of 0.004% and 0.012% respectively".  give the constructive sentence for this

A constructive sentence for this information could be: "Steps should be taken to correct the units of the LOD and LOQ values in the COAs of batches 25524516, 25524517, and 25524952 from ppm to %, in accordance with the Tofacitinib citrate STP and the Enantiomer content test measurements in the LIMS master."

The necessary corrective action would involve updating the units in the COAs for batches 25524516, 25524517, and 25524952 to reflect the correct values of ppm instead of %. This adjustment should align with both the Tofacitinib citrate STP and the Enantiomer content test measurements recorded in the LIMS master.

"Verified the analytical data of enantiomeric test for subject three batches (25524516, 25524517 and 25524952) and the obtained enantiomer content results found to have met the specification , the results are", give the correct sentence for this

Upon verification of the analytical data from the enantiomeric test for batches 25524516, 25524517, and 25524952, it was determined that the obtained enantiomer content results meet the specified requirements.

"As per respective Tofacitinib citrate STP (STP/FPR/TOC/003/00) and Enantiomer content by HPLC test units as % and their LOD, LOQ values are 0.004% and 0.012% respectively". give the correct sentence for this

According to the respective Tofacitinib citrate STP (STP/FPR/TOC/003/00), the units for the Enantiomer content by HPLC test should be expressed as a percentage (%), with corresponding LOD and LOQ values of 0.004% and 0.012% respectively.

"The subject three batches (25524516, 25524517 and 25524952) enantiomer content results were less than 0.012%, as per the obtaining enantiomer content results to be reported as BQL (LOQ:0.012 %) and BDL (LOD:0.004%), however the results appeared as BQL (LOQ:0.012ppm) instead of BQL (LOQ:0.012%) and BDL (LOD:0.004ppm) instead of BDL (LOD:0.004%) in the COAs.
Verified the subject Tofacitinib citrate product LIMS test plan of respective STP (STP/FPR/TOC/003/00) in the LIMS master , subject test plan was initiated by H. Madhusudhana Rao (QCD, m251175) and approved by QC & QA reviewer [B. Jagannadha Naidu (QCD, m251169) and S. Rama Krishna (QAD,m251160)] ". give the constructive sentence for this

To address the discrepancy, it is important to rectify the units used in the COAs for batches 25524516, 25524517, and 25524952. The enantiomer content results for these batches were found to be below 0.012%, which should be reported as BQL (LOQ: 0.012%) and BDL (LOD: 0.004%). However, the COAs incorrectly indicated these results as BQL (LOQ: 0.012ppm) and BDL (LOD: 0.004ppm). To ensure consistency, verification of the Tofacitinib citrate product LIMS test plan, as outlined in the respective STP (STP/FPR/TOC/003/00) in the LIMS master, was conducted. It was confirmed that H. Madhusudhana Rao (QCD, m251175) initiated the subject test plan, which was subsequently approved by QC & QA reviewers, including B. Jagannadha Naidu (QCD, m251169) and S. Rama Krishna (QAD, m251160).

"Verified the Enantiomer content by HPLC test in the LIMS master and the UOM for the Enantiomer content found to be in %.However, units of the LOD and LOQ were identified  as 0.004 ppm and 0.012 ppm instead of 0.004% and 0.012% respectively".  give the constructive sentence for this

Upon verification of the Enantiomer content by HPLC test in the LIMS master, it was observed that the units of measurement (UOM) for the Enantiomer content were correctly reported as %. However, it was identified that the units for the LOD and LOQ values were mistakenly indicated as 0.004 ppm and 0.012 ppm instead of the intended 0.004% and 0.012% respectively. This discrepancy needs to be rectified to ensure accurate reporting of the LOD and LOQ values.

"As per the created LIMS test plan, 
if the obtained enantiomer content results were less than 0.004% , BDL (LOD:0.004ppm) in the COA.
if the obtained enantiomer content results were less than 0.012%, BQL (LOQ:0.012ppm) in the COA.

As per test plan identified discrepancy, the subject batches (25524516, 25524517 and 25524952) enantiomer content results appeared as BQL (LOQ:0.012ppm) instead of BQL (LOQ:0.012%) in the COA.
Based on the above data, the  discrepancy occurred due to typographical error in the LOD, LOQ values in subject Enantiomer content by HPLC test while creating test plan in LIMS master  and same was not identified by QC& QA reviewer during the approval of test plan.
As part of impact assessment, verified the other STPs test plans of Tofacitinib citrate and found same discrepancy was observed in the STP/FPR/TOC/001, STP/FPR/TOC/001(STB), STP/FPR/TOC/002, STP/FPR/TOC/003 test plans w.r.t  enantiomer content units in ‘ppm’ instead of ‘%.  and no abnormality identified in the STP/FPR/TOC/003 (STB) test plan.
Verified the previously approved(18) batches as per the respective STPS and the results of the Enantiomer content  tabulated below," give the constructive sentence for this

Based on the created LIMS test plan, if the obtained enantiomer content results were less than 0.004%, it should be reported as BDL (LOD: 0.004ppm) in the COA. Similarly, if the obtained enantiomer content results were less than 0.012%, it should be reported as BQL (LOQ: 0.012ppm) in the COA.

However, a discrepancy was identified in the subject batches (25524516, 25524517, and 25524952) where the enantiomer content results appeared as BQL (LOQ: 0.012ppm) instead of BQL (LOQ: 0.012%) in the COA. This discrepancy can be attributed to a typographical error in the LOD and LOQ values when creating the test plan in the LIMS master. Furthermore, this error went unnoticed by the QC & QA reviewer during the approval of the test plan.

To assess the impact, an evaluation was conducted on the other STPs test plans of Tofacitinib citrate. It was observed that the same discrepancy existed in the STP/FPR/TOC/001, STP/FPR/TOC/001(STB), STP/FPR/TOC/002, and STP/FPR/TOC/003 test plans, where enantiomer content units were denoted as 'ppm' instead of '%'. However, no abnormality was found in the STP/FPR/TOC/003 (STB) test plan.

To further investigate, previously approved batches (18 in total) were verified according to their respective STPs. The results of the Enantiomer content are tabulated below:

"Above 18 batches results found to be more than LOQ value (i.e., 0.012%). Hence, there is no impact reporting results on the COAs.

Subject three bathes (#25524516, # 25524517 and #25524952) COAs were impacted,  and the obtained results were found to be below LOQ and LOD. However, there was no change in results and only discrepancy was  identified in  reporting results units (i.e. ppm’ instead of ‘%.) w.r.t Enantiomer content. 

Hence, as a corrective action subject Enantiomer content by HPLC test and test plan (i.e., STP/FPR/TOC/001, STP/FPR/TOC/001(STB), STP/FPR/TOC/002, STP/FPR/TOC/003) shall be modified to in line with STP and the impacted three bathes ((#25524516, # 25524517 and #25524952) shall be recertified. 

Refresh training shall be  provided to the concerned personnel and LIMS masters  on SOP(SOP-000481619". give the constructive sentence

Upon evaluation of the results from the 18 previously approved batches, it was determined that all the results were above the LOQ value (0.012%). Hence, there is no impact on reporting the results on the COAs for these batches.

However, for the subject three batches (#25524516, #25524517, and #25524952), the COAs were indeed impacted as the obtained results were below the LOQ and LOD. The discrepancy solely lies in the reporting of results units, with 'ppm' instead of '%', for the Enantiomer content.

To address this discrepancy, appropriate corrective actions should be taken. This includes modifying the Enantiomer content by HPLC test and the test plans (STP/FPR/TOC/001, STP/FPR/TOC/001(STB), STP/FPR/TOC/002, STP/FPR/TOC/003) in accordance with the respective STP requirements. Additionally, the impacted three batches (#25524516, #25524517, and #25524952) should undergo recertification.

To prevent future occurrences, it is recommended to provide refresh training to the concerned personnel and LIMS master operators on the standard operating procedure SOP-000481619.

"Before proceeding for particle size analysis, nitrogen shall be purged to the sample to avoid particles agglomeration. Take ~ 10 grams of sample in a self-seal bag and purge Nitrogen for ~2 minutes and after getting the bubble form, shake vigorously for ~2 mins".  give the proper senstence.

Before conducting the particle size analysis, it is essential to purge the sample with nitrogen to prevent particle agglomeration. To do this, take approximately 10 grams of the sample and place it in a self-seal bag. Purge the sample with nitrogen for approximately 2 minutes until bubbles form. Afterwards, shake the bag vigorously for approximately 2 minutes.

Exiting CAPA given as Before proceeding to the particle size analysis nitrogen purging shall be done for the sample  which is under particle size test to get uniform dispersion. as per PR#XXXXX" , now CAPA has been redefined as  Before proceeding for particle size analysis, nitrogen shall be purged to the sample. Take ~ 10 grams of sample in a self-seal bag and purge Nitrogen for ~2 minutes and after getting the bubble form, shake vigorously for ~2 mins”. as per CAPA PR#XXXX.                    give the constructive sentence for this

The corrective action (CAPA) has been redefined as follows: "Before conducting the particle size analysis as per CAPA PR#XXXX, it is necessary to purge the sample with nitrogen. To do this, take approximately 10 grams of the sample and place it in a self-seal bag. Proceed to purge the sample with nitrogen for approximately 2 minutes, waiting for bubbles to form. After this, shake the bag vigorously for approximately 2 minutes."
Proposed CAPA (PR#326119) has been redefined to exiting CAPA (PR#1522990). give the constructive sentence for this
The proposed corrective action (CAPA) with PR#326119 has been redefined to align with the existing CAPA with PR#1522990.
"Below mentioned LIMS Test plan modified to against to CAPA, so please give the approval on priority." give the constructive sentence
Please prioritize the approval for the modifications made to the LIMS Test plan mentioned below, which are in accordance with the CAPA.
